title: policy/decision
description: The four-way Policy Decision Point result (ADR-0061 decision 1 / ADR-0062). outcome is a closed enum; a most-restrictive-wins lattice combines many controls (deny > escalate > require_approval > allow). reasons enumerate ALL contributing controls (§1.8); obligations are the binding riders of the winning controls; provenance stamps the evaluator + pinned policy. Engine plugins (OPA/Cerbos/Cedar, ADR-0061 §7.5) normalise their native output to this shape; the built-in CEL evaluator produces it directly.

obligation.description: A binding rider on a decision. type is drawn from a CLOSED enum (ADR-0061 guardrail 1); a new obligation type is its own ADR, never an inline extension.
